name: Cream of Cauliflower and Cheese Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 cups Cauliflower Florets (cut to uniform size)
1/4 pound Cheddar Cheese, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
If reducing fat, use margarine and skim milk instead of butter and regular milk.
1. In a heavy 4-quart kettle, bring water, onion, basil, salt, and pepper to a boil over medium heat.
2. Add cauliflower florets; cover and cook until tender about 15 minutes.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt butter or margarine. Gradually add flour, whisking constantly until smooth.
4. Slowly incorporate hot chicken stock while continuing to whisk. Pour this mixture into the kettle with cauliflower.
5. Heat milk in the saucepan over low heat; stir in cheese until melted.
6. Combine the milk-cheese mixture with the soup and stir well. Reheat until the soup begins to steam.
Serves 6 to 8.
